# Domain Concepts

> **Scope**: Core domain concepts, extension contracts, and invariants in plugin architecture.
> **Confidence**: Low
> **Last updated**: 2026-05-16
> **Source entries**: OBS-000

- ❓ Plugin contracts define capabilities and lifecycle hooks.
- ❓ Contract versions are explicit and evolve with compatibility discipline.
- ❓ Cross-module interaction happens through abstractions and events.
